declarations.name: VaadinButton
declarations.description: A button component from the Vaadin component suite.

members.name: disabled
members.description: If true, the user cannot interact with this element.

members.name: autofocus
members.description: Specify that this control should have input focus when the page loads.

members.name: theme
members.description: The theme variants to apply to the button, e.g. primary, error, contrast, small, large.

events.name: click
events.description: Fired when the button is clicked.

slots.name: prefix
slots.description: Content to render before the label (e.g. an icon).

slots.name: suffix
slots.description: Content to render after the label (e.g. an icon).

declarations.name: VaadinTextField
declarations.description: A single-line text input component from the Vaadin component suite.

members.name: label
members.description: String used for the label element.

members.name: value
members.description: Current value of the text field.

members.name: placeholder
members.description: A hint to the user of what can be entered in the control.

members.name: required
members.description: Specifies that the user must fill in a value.

members.name: disabled
members.description: If true, the user cannot interact with this element.

members.name: readonly
members.description: This attribute indicates that the user cannot modify the value of the control.

members.name: errorMessage
members.description: Error to show when the input value is invalid.

members.name: invalid
members.description: This property is set to true when the control value is invalid.

events.name: value-changed
events.description: Fired when the value property changes.

events.name: change
events.description: Fired when an alteration to the element's value is committed by the user.

events.name: input
events.description: Fired when the value of the element changes.

slots.name: prefix
slots.description: Content to render before the input.

slots.name: suffix
slots.description: Content to render after the input.

slots.name: helper
slots.description: Slot for helper text below the input.

slots.name: error-message
slots.description: Slot for custom error message content.

cssProperties.name: --vaadin-text-field-background
cssProperties.description: Background color of the text field.

cssProperties.name: --vaadin-text-field-border-color
cssProperties.description: Border color of the text field.

declarations.name: VaadinGrid
declarations.description: A feature-rich data grid component from the Vaadin component suite.

members.name: items
members.description: An array containing the items which will be stamped as rows.

members.name: multiSort
members.description: When true, all columns are sortable and clicking on a column header will sort multiple columns.

members.name: loading
members.description: Indicates whether the grid is loading new items.

events.name: active-item-changed
events.description: Fired when the active item changes.

events.name: selected-items-changed
events.description: Fired when the selected items change.

events.name: loading-changed
events.description: Fired when the loading property changes.

cssProperties.name: --vaadin-grid-cell-background
cssProperties.description: Background color of the grid cells.
